description_long: This is a wooden rocking chair designed in the shape of a horse, commonly intended for children. The chair features a solid seat with armrests on both sides and a high, slatted backrest for support. The base consists of two long, curved runners that allow the chair to rock back and forth smoothly. The front of the chair is adorned with a stylized horse head, complete with a cut-out for the ear and a simple eye detail. The construction appears sturdy, with all visible parts made from light-colored wood, and the overall design is both playful and functional. The chair is suitable for placement in parks, playgrounds, or residential outdoor spaces.
description: A light wooden rocking chair shaped like a horse, with armrests, a slatted backrest, and curved runners for rocking. Designed for children, it combines playful aesthetics with sturdy construction.
description_view_0: Side view showing the horse head, armrests, slatted backrest, and the full length of the curved runners.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the slatted backrest and the symmetry of the armrests and runners.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the horse head and armrest details, with clear visibility of the seat and runners.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the open seat area, armrests, and the front ends of the curved runners.
